3.why: The search needs the grid bounds to detect edges.
3.invariant: m stays fixed for the whole search.

4.why: The search needs the grid bounds to detect edges.
4.invariant: n stays fixed for the whole search.

5.happening: No match found yet — the answer starts false.
5.why: It flips to true only if some search succeeds.
5.invariant: answer is true only once the word is found.

6.why: The word could begin at any cell.
6.invariant: Every start cell is tried until one works.

7.happening: Trying start cell ({sr}, {sc}) as the first letter.
7.why: Each cell is a candidate first letter of the word.

8.why: It tries to match the whole word starting here.
8.invariant: A true result means the word was found from this cell.

9.happening: The search succeeded — setting the answer to true.
9.why: A start cell led to a full match.

10.happening: Returning true — the word exists in the grid.

11.happening: Returning false — no start cell matched the word.
11.why: Every cell was tried without success.
11.invariant: The word is not in the grid.

14.happening: All {len(word)} letters matched — this path spells the word!
14.why: Reaching k equal to the length means the word is complete.
14.invariant: A completed path is a success.

14.happening: Matched {k} of {len(word)} letters so far — keep searching neighbours.
14.why: There are still letters left to place.
14.invariant: k counts how many letters are matched on this path.

15.happening: Reporting a full match back up the search.
15.why: This path found the entire word.
15.invariant: Success propagates back toward the start cell.

16.happening: Checking whether the cursor stepped off the top or bottom edge.
16.why: A move outside the grid can never match a letter.

17.happening: Off the grid vertically — this path fails.
17.why: There is no cell here to match against.

18.happening: Checking whether the cursor stepped off the left or right edge.
18.why: A move outside the grid can never match a letter.

19.happening: Off the grid horizontally — this path fails.
19.why: There is no cell here to match against.

20.happening: Cell letter '{board[cr][cc]}' does not match needed '{word[k]}' — dead end.
20.why: The path can only continue on the exact next letter.

20.happening: Cell letter '{board[cr][cc]}' matches needed '{word[k]}' — extend the path.
20.why: The letters line up, so this cell joins the path.

21.why: This cell cannot be the next letter.

22.happening: Saving this cell's letter '{board[cr][cc]}' before marking it.
22.why: It must be restored when we backtrack.

23.why: A used cell cannot be reused within the same path.
23.invariant: The current path is marked on the board.

24.happening: No success yet from this cell.
24.why: We will try each of the four neighbours in turn.
24.invariant: found stays false until a direction works.

25.happening: If still unfound, try the cell below.
25.why: Down is the first direction explored.
25.invariant: We stop early once found is true.

26.happening: Searching downward for the next letter.
26.why: The path extends to the cell below.
26.invariant: Depth-first: fully explore down before other directions.

27.happening: Down led to a full match.
27.why: The path completes through the cell below.

28.happening: If still unfound, try the cell above.
28.invariant: We stop early once found is true.

29.happening: Searching upward for the next letter.
29.why: The path extends to the cell above.
29.invariant: Depth-first: fully explore up before the rest.

30.happening: Up led to a full match.
30.why: The path completes through the cell above.

31.happening: If still unfound, try the cell to the right.
31.invariant: We stop early once found is true.

32.happening: Searching rightward for the next letter.
32.why: The path extends to the cell on the right.
32.invariant: Depth-first: fully explore right before left.

33.happening: Right led to a full match.
33.why: The path completes through the cell to the right.

34.happening: If still unfound, try the cell to the left.
34.invariant: We stop early once found is true.

35.happening: Searching leftward for the next letter.
35.why: The path extends to the cell on the left.

36.happening: Left led to a full match.
36.why: The path completes through the cell to the left.

37.why: The cell is freed so other paths can use it.
37.invariant: The board returns to its earlier state.

38.happening: Reporting this cell's result to the caller.
38.why: found tells the caller whether this branch matched.

init.happening: Setting up the board size and the answer flag.
init.why: The scan needs bounds and a result to update.
init.invariant: answer is true only when the word is found.

loop.happening: Scanning start cells for the first letter.
loop.why: The word can start anywhere in the grid.

check.happening: Testing a cell: in bounds, matching, or a dead end.
check.why: Each check can prune the current path.
check.invariant: Only matching, in-grid cells extend the path.

recurse.happening: Searching a neighbouring cell for the next letter.
recurse.why: Depth-first explores one direction fully before the next.
recurse.invariant: The recursion depth equals the matched-letter count.

update.happening: Marking the path, recording success, or restoring a cell.
update.why: The board is marked while on a path and restored on backtrack.
update.invariant: found tracks whether this cell's branch matched.

return.happening: Reporting success or failure up the search.
return.why: Each call returns whether its branch matched.
return.invariant: Results propagate back to the start cell.
